"C:\Program Files\JetBrains\CLion 2020.1\bin\cmake\win\bin\cmake.exe" -E remove -f CMakeFiles\05_regex_replace.dir/objects.a
C:\Users\zzj\Documents\workspace\LinkLibrary\mingw64\bin\ar.exe cr CMakeFiles\05_regex_replace.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\05_regex_replace.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\Users\zzj\Documents\workspace\LinkLibrary\mingw64\bin\g++.exe -g   -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\05_regex_replace.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive  -o 05_regex_replace.exe -Wl,--out-implib,lib05_regex_replace.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\05_regex_replace.dir\linklibs.rsp
